Washington is just taking the lead of the coast states

The woman SufraglstS of California mustered ~ votes
for woman suffrage constitutional amendment, when
vote taken in the assembly Sacramento and there

jorty required and therefore they lost. The pro-
posed amendment will not be submitted, and the voters
of the state will not be asked allowed to vote upon it.

1t is probably true that not only every state, but every
city in the country with population of than 49,
600, has an active woman suffrage organization.


But still the most important question of all in this
nectiOn remains unanswered The question is, Do the
women themselves really want to vote? Would the major
Iy OF them decide if test ballot is taken?


In this connection it is to be remembered that there is
an organization of women back east whose earnest bust
ness it is to oppose suffrage Every important
from this organization, and these publications
warmly antagonstic to equal suffrage any of the
publications the other side.


What the facts? Do the ma jority of thinking wives
and mothers want the right to the polls and to votes
That is the first question that should be answered and
answered fairly


This question could only be fully answered by actual
test ballot, test ballot cast at regular polling places
polling places located in tents, fire engine houses barns
and vacant store private house cellars to which
go The mere circulation of petitions to be
signed by at their homes after chat and perhaps
cup of tea would not fully answer the question
